changes: Riot Blade potency increased from 120 to 140; combo potency increased from 280 to 300.
Circle of Scorn potency increased from 100 to 120.
Divine Veil effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Royal Authority potency increased from 120 to 140; combo potency increased from 380 to 400.
Atonement potency increased from 380 to 400; execution no longer interrupts action combos.
Storm's Path potency increased from 150 to 160; combo potency increased from 430 to 440.
Vengeance: Vulnerability Down status effect combined with the Vengeance status effect.
Storm's Eye potency increased from 150 to 160; combo potency increased from 430 to 440.
Fell Cleave potency increased from 490 to 520.
Upheaval potency increased from 370 to 400.
Shake It Off effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Inner Chaos potency increased from 650 to 660.
Dark Missionary effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Keen Edge potency increased from 170 to 200.
Brutal Shell potency increased from 130 to 160; combo potency increased from 270 to 300.
Heart of Light effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Mantra effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Brotherhood effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Jump: Can now be executed while bound, no longer affects character's position as recognized by the server, and camera will no longer follow character.
Battle Litany effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Dragon Sight now nullifies action direction requirements for self.
High Jump: Can now be executed while bound, no longer affects character's position as recognized by the server, and camera will no longer follow character.
Tenka Goken effect radius increased from 5 to 8 yalms.
Hissatsu: Senei potency increased from 800 to 860.
Kaeshi: Goken effect radius increased from 5 to 8 yalms.
Shoha potency increased from 520 to 560.
Ogi Namikiri potency increased from 800 to 860.
Kaeshi: Namikiri potency increased from 800 to 860.
Arcane Circle effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Mage's Ballad range of additional effect granting to self and party members increased from 30 to 50 yalms.
Army's Paeon range of additional effect granting to self and party members increased from 30 to 50 yalms.
Battle Voice effect radius increased from 20 to 30 yalms.
The Wanderer's Minuet range of additional effect granting to self and party members increased from 30 to 50 yalms.
Troubadour effect radius increased from 20 to 30 yalms.
Nature's Minne effect radius increased from 20 to 30 yalms.
Radiant Finale effect radius increased from 20 to 30 yalms.
Tactician effect radius increased from 20 to 30 yalms.
Shield Samba effect radius increased from 20 to 30 yalms.
Single, Double, Triple, and Quadruple Technical Finish: Range of step bonus effect granting Technical Finish and Esprit to self and party members increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Xenoglossy potency increased from 800 to 880.
Enhanced Enochian III: Magic damage increase changed from 21% to 23%.
Searing Light effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Embolden effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Magick Barrier effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Asylum effect radius increased from 10 to 15 yalms.
Dia potency increased from 60 to 65; damage over time potency increased from 60 to 65.
Temperance range of effect reducing damage taken by self and party members increased from 30 to 50 yalms.
Fey Illumination effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Sacred Soil effect radius increased from 10 to 15 yalms.
Deployment Tactics effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Seraphic Illumination effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Consolation effect radius increased from 20 to 30 yalms.
Expedient effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Summon Selene has been removed.
Divination effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Collective Unconscious: Range of additional effect reducing damage taken increased from 8 to 30 yalms; duration of damage reduction effect set to 5 seconds (reapplied upon re-entering bounds).
Kerachole effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Physis II effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Holos effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Panhaima effect radius increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Eukrasian Dosis III potency increased from 70 to 75.
Peloton effect radius increased from 20 to 30 yalms.

Holy Sheltron: Potency of damage dealt if the barrier is not absorbed and the effect duration expires has been changed from 2,000 plus 50% of the barrier's remaining potency to 100% of the barrier's remaining potency.
Enlightenment: Potency of Pressure Point effect's additional damage has been reduced from 12,000 to 8,000.
Thunderclap: Wind Resonance effect duration has been increased from 5 to 10 seconds.
Thunderclap: Wind Resonance effect duration extension has been increased from 5 to 10 seconds.
Wyrmwind Thrust: Potency has been changed from 4,000-16,000 to 8,000-16,000.
Heavens' Thrust: Potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Horrid Roar: Potency has been increased from 2,000 to 4,000.
High Jump: Potency has been reduced from 5,000 to 4,000.
Sky Shatter: Potency has been reduced from 18,000 to 16,000.
Bunshin: Effect duration has been reduced from 30 to 20 seconds.
Seiton Tenchu: Time required to fill the limit gauge has been increased from 90 to 105 seconds.
Hissatsu: Chiten: Kuzushi effect duration has been increased from 3 to 4 seconds.
Soul Slice: Recast time has been reduced from 20 to 15 seconds.
Grim Swathe: Maximum stacks of Soul Reaver have been reduced from 2 to 1.
Guillotine: New action added. Delivers an attack with a potency of 8,000 to all enemies in a cone before you. Can only be executed while under the effect of Soul Reaver.
Gibbet: Removed.
Gallows: Removed.
Silent Nocturne: Potency has been reduced from 2,000 to 0.
Silent Nocturne: Range has been reduced from 25 to 15 yalms.
Silent Nocturne: Silence effect duration has been reduced from 3 to 2 seconds.
Apex Arrow: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Repelling Shot: Potency has been increased from 2,000 to 4,000.
The Warden's Paean: Warden's Grace effect reducing damage taken has been changed from 20% to 25%.
The Warden's Paean: Warden's Grace effect increasing HP recovered by healing actions has been changed from 20% to 25%.
Bioblaster: Potency is now also doubled while under the effect of Analysis.
Chain Saw: Damage potency has been reduced from 12,000 to 8,000.
Chain Saw: Potency is now increased by 50% when target's HP is below 50%.

Chain Saw: The additional effect '3% chance to deal damage equal to 95% of target's HP while under the effect of Analysis' has been changed to 'Potency is increased by 50% while under the effect of Analysis.'
Enchanted Riposte: The additional effect 'Barrier potency is increased by 10% when target is afflicted with Monomachy' has been added.
Enchanted Zwerchhau: The additional effect 'Barrier potency is increased by 10% when target is afflicted with Monomachy' has been added.
Enchanted Redoublement: The additional effect 'Barrier potency is increased by 10% when target is afflicted with Monomachy' has been added.
Toxikon: Effect duration has been increased from 5 to 6 seconds.
Toxikon II: Effect duration has been increased from 5 to 6 seconds.

new_content.name: Pandæmonium: Anabaseios (Savage)
new_content.description: A new savage difficulty raid dungeon.

new_content.name: Eater of Souls
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Aggressive Expansion
new_content.description: Tataru's Grand Endeavor side story quest.

new_content.name: Island Sanctuary
new_content.description: System update: increased rank, new gathering areas, construction plots, and furnishing glamours.

new_content.name: Furnishing Glamours
new_content.description: System feature allowing placement of furnishings as glamours in the Island Sanctuary.

new_content.name: Subaquatic Voyages
new_content.description: Company system update adding new nautical maps, areas, and items.

new_content.name: Ruby Route
new_content.description: New exploration zone/voyage route for Ocean Fishing.

new_content.name: Foraging Expedition Area
new_content.description: New area added for foraging expeditions in Island Sanctuary.

housing.name: Watcher's Palace Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall crafted to mimic the design of the Watcher's Palace.

housing.name: Watcher's Palace Flooring
housing.description: A section of flooring crafted to mimic the design of the Watcher's Palace.

housing.name: Watcher's Palace Ceiling Lamp
housing.description: A chandelier crafted to resemble the lamps found in the Watcher's Palace.

housing.name: Island Garden Fence
housing.description: A rudimentary wooden fence, designed to complement the simple lifestyle of the Cieldalaes.

housing.name: Island Parasol Table
housing.description: An understated outside table, designed to complement the simple lifestyle of the Cieldalaes.

housing.name: Island Wooden Chair
housing.description: A modest wooden chair, designed to complement the simple lifestyle of the Cieldalaes.

housing.name: Railway Sleepers
housing.description: A rustic ground covering made from repurposed railway sleepers.

housing.name: Garden Creek
housing.description: Complete with running water, this soothing stonebound creek is the perfect place to dip your toes on a hot summer's day.

housing.name: Mushroom Medley Lamp
housing.description: Illuminate your garden with this three-tiered collection of fungal furniture.

housing.name: Country Swing Seat
housing.description: Escape the midday sun beneath the roof of this charming wooden swing seat.

housing.name: Well Pump
housing.description: This working well pump provides a reliable─and apparently endless─source of clean water.

housing.name: Ivy-canopied Deck
housing.description: The ivy strung atop this wooden deck throws the seating area below into an idyllic dappled shade.

housing.name: Cieldalaes Planter
housing.description: A tall pot featuring an even taller plant native to the Cieldalaes.

housing.name: Chair Hena
housing.description: An elegant piece of furniture named for the tragic civilization which produced its original design.

housing.name: Fishing Rod Rack
housing.description: A decorative display stand for the fishing gear enthusiast.

housing.name: Verdant Pillar
housing.description: A pillar crafted to resemble a natural tree. Squirrels not included.

housing.name: Freestanding Rattan Hammock
housing.description: Based on a southern seas furnishing, this freestanding hammock allows you to laze in the location of your choice.

housing.name: Classic Umbrella Stand
housing.description: An understated period piece that one might see in a grandsire's entryway.

housing.name: Rustic Log Bench
housing.description: A modest bench hewn from a single log.

housing.name: Short Pillar Bookshelf
housing.description: A pillar to support your academic pursuits. Not so much your ceiling.

housing.name: Rattan Partition
housing.description: The division provided by this southern seas partition is more of a suggestion.

housing.name: Serving Barrel
housing.description: A wooden barrel for storing your favorite alcoholic beverage. Complete with spigot for easy serving.

housing.name: Botanist's Work Table
housing.description: A work station custom-made for the botanically inclined.

housing.name: Rustic Log Table
housing.description: A plain table hewn from a single log.

housing.name: Vintage Side Table
housing.description: A circular side table of unobtrusive design.

housing.name: Classic Tableware
housing.description: A tableware set of simple, antique design.

housing.name: Scattered Tomes
housing.description: Create an impression of scholarly study with this artfully disordered pile of reference materials.

housing.name: Raw Log Half Partition
housing.description: A rustic fence constructed of unrefined logs and branches.

housing.name: Botanical Candle Display
housing.description: Similar to a normal candle display, but with considerably more dried flora.

housing.name: Classic Table Lamp
housing.description: A simple shaded lamp.

housing.name: Steamed Shumai
housing.description: Wrapped in a wafer-thin skin and steamed to perfection, these bite-sized dumplings are a Far Eastern favorite.

housing.name: Fried Gyoza
housing.description: While boiling is the norm in Yanxia, Kugane culinarians prefer to crisp these crescent-shaped dumplings in a pan before serving.

housing.name: Drowned King Sculpture
housing.description: This statue emanates the menace of a deadly undertow.

housing.name: Eventide Sword Stand
housing.description: It is uncertain what is on display here: the greatsword, or the shadowy energies which crackle and writhe along its length.

housing.name: Azure Sky Phasmascape
housing.description: An imitation skylight with illusory properties. Gaze upwards to appreciate this portal to an inviting blue sky.

housing.name: Starry Sky Phasmascape
housing.description: An imitation skylight with illusory properties. Gaze upwards to appreciate this portal to a star-studded expanse.

housing.name: Forever at Your Side
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of a former imperial officer and his adopted children entitled Forever at Your Side.

housing.name: Imitation Curtained Window
housing.description: A clever semblance of a window to the outside. One can almost hear the birds chirping.

housing.name: Imitation Moonlit Window
housing.description: The soft, lunar light of this deceptive window is best appreciated in near darkness.

housing.name: Metal Pipe Wall Shelf
housing.description: The exposed pipes and pressure gauges of this shelving system provide a distinct "boiler room" aesthetic.

housing.name: Floating Kitchen Cabinet
housing.description: A wall-mounted kitchen cabinet. For those expecting a levitating cupboard, prepare to be disappointed.

housing.name: Ivy Pendant Wall Light
housing.description: A trio of lamps hanging from an ivy-covered, wall-mounted branch.

housing.name: Crystarium Pendant Wall Light
housing.description: A wall-mounted trio of hanging lamps crafted in the Crystarium style.

housing.name: Imitation Closed Door
housing.description: The sign on this mock wooden door forbids entry. Please respect its authority.

housing.name: Wall-mounted Pot Rack
housing.description: A handy circular rack for hanging stovetop utensils.
